title: Fix method calls parsing in constraints
body:
Previous error:

```
%Error: t/t_constraint_xml.v:55:11: Cannot call non-static member function 'strings_equal' without object (IEEE 1800-2023 8.10)
                                  : ... note: In instance 't'
   55 |       if (strings_equal(state, "ok"))
      |           ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

Replaces #5056
code_blocks:
%Error: t/t_constraint_xml.v:55:11: Cannot call non-static member function 'strings_equal' without object (IEEE 1800-2023 8.10)
                                  : ... note: In instance 't'
   55 |       if (strings_equal(state, "ok"))
      |           ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
